version: V18 Active Holdings / Approved Universe Guard

AMZN.demotion_reason: Accelerated harvest-only P3: no routine buys; recycle proceeds into leaders, external incubator, or SPCX.

ANET.demotion_reason: P2 tactical leader; receives allocation after P1.

NVDA.demotion_reason: Manual decision approved: NVDA moved to P2. Hold/harvest/monitor; no automatic sale. Reinstatement requires leadership >=85 for 5 consecutive sessions.
NVDA.manual_decision: APPROVED: NVDA demoted P1 -> P2 for new capital allocation.

PANW.demotion_reason: Manual decision approved: PANW promoted to P1 alongside TSM due to sustained leadership.

TSM.demotion_reason: P1 primary leader and largest deployment target.

rules.manual_approval_required: Strategic core demotions are recommendations only. NVDA P1 -> P2 was explicitly approved for new capital only.
rules.p1_review_trigger: score <60 for 5 consecutive trading sessions AND at least two alternatives >=85
rules.single_day_reading: cannot demote a strategic core holding
rules.spcx: SPCX is excluded from P1/P2/P3 and governed as Strategic Special Situation. Target 10%, max 15%.
rules.v43_active_holdings_rule: META removed. Rotation/ladders must operate on active holdings only unless a symbol is manually reactivated.
rules.meta: META removed from active holdings and ladders; historical transactions remain only in transaction history.
